primary_catalyst.description: Pre-earnings run-up on release day. Q4 FY26 earnings scheduled for post-close release. Visible Alpha consensus for revenue was ~$57B (official figure actually $68.1B). NVDA gained ~0.7% intraday ahead of the after-hours print; additional lift from broad market strength.

secondary_catalysts.description: Bloomberg preview: 'Nvidia's Rosy Revenue Forecast Shows the AI Boom Remains Strong'

force_attributions.rationale: Classic pre-earnings positioning; volume z=+2.89 shows heavy institutional engagement
Bloomberg preview reinforced hyperscaler capex thesis going into the print

notes: Pre-earnings drift with very high volume (vol_z +2.89) â€” straddle buyers, institutional positioning. Earnings released AFTER close.
